creator: tj+freebsd_ports@a13.fr
text:
I tested the port after it was updated (patch from comment #2) and again a few days ago. Each time I completed a few maps of the first episodes, but I didn't use the dedicated server.
I will close the PR because I'm happy with this update.

I was not sure if I should have closed it at the time, if we wanted to do more work (about the patch listed in comment #3). But this info is not lost and I guess we could open a new PR later.

Thank you very much.
